At a Glance

About

I’m a Technical Founder at CareBridge Connect, Investment Analyst at Nucleus Fund, and a student at BYU’s Marriott School of Business — focused on AI architecture, software engineering, and strategic consulting.

I design and ship AI-native systems, then evaluate them from an investor’s perspective. That dual lens — deep technical execution and strategic business thinking — is what I bring to every problem. I’ve shipped six products from zero to live, performed due diligence on 15+ startups, and built systems that operate at the intersection of healthcare, AI, and enterprise.

Learn more about my background →

What I Bring

Strategic Consulting

  • AI Integration Strategy
  • Due Diligence & Market Analysis
  • Financial Modeling & Valuation
  • Go-to-Market & Product Strategy

Technical Skills

  • Python, SQL, VBA
  • Full-Stack Development (Next.js, React, FastAPI)
  • Data Analytics & Statistical Modeling
  • Database Design (PostgreSQL, Supabase)

AI Architecture

  • LLM Integration (OpenAI, Grok, Claude)
  • Prompt Engineering & Reasoning Systems
  • Agentic Systems & Automation
  • HIPAA-Compliant AI Infrastructure

Featured Projects

CareBridge Connect

A HIPAA-compliant B2B platform that eliminates 2-3 hours of nurse call burden per shift by translating clinical documentation into plain-language family updates. Pivoted from consumer to B2B after customer discovery revealed stronger product-market fit with facility operators.

Key Features:

  • Event-based care timeline surfaced from existing facility documentation
  • AI-generated daily/weekly progress summaries in plain language
  • Guardrailed AI chat for 24/7 family inquiries
  • Secure Vault for medical documents and emergency information

Live Demo View Source Case Study

Compass

A business development automation platform for professional services firms. Monitors commercial triggers (court filings, funding rounds, executive hires), scores prospects with a proprietary relevance algorithm, and generates contextual outreach – replacing the manual grind that most rainmakers abandon within weeks.

Key Features:

  • Signal Library for monitoring commercial triggers across industries
  • R-Score algorithm for intelligent prospect ranking
  • AI-powered Hook Generator for contextual outreach
  • Daily Digest with human-in-the-loop review workflow

Case Study

Currently in active development

Consulting Agent

A strategic advisory platform that compresses the execution layer of consulting – SCQA structuring, MECE frameworks, Pyramid Principle – so practitioners can focus on judgment, where expertise actually compounds. Generates complete executive decks from a single brief.

Key Features:

  • Interactive advisory chat at senior consultant level
  • Executive deck builder with PPTX export (5–20 slides)
  • SCQA framework builder and consulting frameworks library
  • Graph/chart builder for data visualization

Live Demo Case Study

AI Pulse

A weekly AI intelligence publication started as a personal curation habit for deal evaluation at Nucleus Fund. Covers research, products, policy, models, and applications – published every Wednesday for the BYU community.

Key Features:

  • 5 curated articles weekly across Research, Products, Policy, Models, and Applications
  • AI-generated drafts with editorial curation and source verification
  • Ties directly to deal evaluation work at Nucleus Fund
  • Searchable archive of past editions

Read Publication Case Study

Eternally

A digital memorial platform with 10,000+ memorials created that turns cemeteries into interactive living memorials. Combines a consumer product (collaborative storytelling, AI photo restoration) with a marketplace model (remote grave services) that cemetery operators can white-label.

Key Features:

  • Life history timeline for collaborative family storytelling
  • Remote grave services marketplace (flowers, cleaning, decorations)
  • AI-enhanced photo and video gallery
  • Interactive cemetery map with offline access

Live Demo Case Study

Peptide Portal

A telemedicine platform serving 4,200+ patients that solves the prescribing compliance layer for peptide therapy – connecting patients with board-certified doctors across weight loss, longevity, recovery, and cognitive performance. Regulatory expertise as a moat.

Key Features:

  • 2-minute free consultation quiz and async physician review
  • Discreet home delivery with no contracts
  • Personal health dashboard with direct provider messaging
  • HIPAA-compliant telemedicine infrastructure

Live Demo Case Study

Currently Exploring

I spend my free cycles on problems at the intersection of AI and enterprise: why most “AI integrations” are surface-level wrappers, how agentic systems can replace entire workflow layers, and where strategic consulting firms are still using 2010-era tooling on 2026 problems. These aren’t hypothetical — they come from building products and sitting in diligence calls.

See what I’m working on →
